heading: Restrictions
label: 200104 Restrictions
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)200104(a)36:5401 (3d sentence words before “and any earnings”).(2d sentence proviso, 3d sentence, last sentence proviso), ; , .Mar. 3, 1901, ch. 876, § 131 Stat. 1453June 29, 1938, ch. 79652 Stat. 1226200104(b)36:5401 (3d sentence words beginning with “and any earnings”).200104(c)36:5401 (2d sentence proviso).200104(d)36:5401 (last sentence proviso).In subsection (b), the words “earnings generated by the corporation” are substituted for “any earnings and/or surplus funds that may be created through any of its educational or scientific activities” to eliminate unnecessary words. The words “may be used only for the purposes provided in ” are substituted for “shall be available only for the further accomplishment of the corporation’s stated purposes” for clarity and for consistency in the revised section.section 200102 of this titleIn subsection (c), the words “Property held by the corporation” are substituted for “all property so held” for clarity. The words “may be used only for the purposes provided in ” are substituted for “shall be held and used solely for the purposes set forth in this chapter” for clarity and for consistency in the revised section.section 200102 of this titleIn subsection (d), the words “District of Columbia” are substituted for “city of Washington” for consistency in the revised title.

The words “may be used only for the purposes provided in ” are substituted for “shall be available only for the further accomplishment of the corporation’s stated purposes” for clarity and for consistency in the revised section.section 200102 of this titleIn subsection (c), the words “Property held by the corporation” are substituted for “all property so held” for clarity. The words “may be used only for the purposes provided in ” are substituted for “shall be held and used solely for the purposes set forth in this chapter” for clarity and for consistency in the revised section.section 200102 of this titleIn subsection (d), the words “District of Columbia” are substituted for “city of Washington” for consistency in the revised title.

children.heading: .—Profit
children.label: a .—Profit
children.text: The corporation may not operate for profit.

children.heading: .—Use of Earnings
children.label: b .—Use of Earnings
children.text: Earnings generated by the corporation may be used only for the purposes provided in .section 200102 of this title

children.heading: .—Use of Property
children.label: c .—Use of Property
children.text: Property held by the corporation, and the proceeds from the property, may be used only for the purposes provided in .section 200102 of this title

children.heading: .—Parks in the District of Columbia
children.label: d .—Parks in the District of Columbia
children.text: The corporation may not occupy any park in the District of Columbia.
